attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HOLD_ALL)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HLD_ALL.DB_SOURCE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HLD_ALL.ORDER_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HLD_ALL.SO_LINE_ID, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HLD_ALL.INV_HOLD, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HLD_ALL.ORG_ID, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HLD_ALL.TRX_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HLD_ALL.TRX_DATE, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HLD_ALL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HLD_ALL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HLD_ALL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HLD_ALL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HLD_ALL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HLD_ALL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HLD_ALL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HLD_ALL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HLD_ALL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HLD_ALL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HLD_ALL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HLD_ALL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HLD_ALL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HLD_ALL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HLD_ALL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HLD_ALL.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HLD_ALL.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HLD_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HLD_ALL.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HLD_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HLD_ALL.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HLD_ALL.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HLD_ALL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HLD_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HLD_ALL.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HLD_ALL STG_CG1_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HLD_ALL,
 (
 select DB_SOURCE_NAME,SO_LINE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HLD_ALL
 minus
 select DB_SOURCE_NAME,SO_LINE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HOLD_ALL
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.DB_SOURCE_NAME = STG_CG1_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HLD_ALL.DB_SOURCE_NAME and ACM.SO_LINE_ID=STG_CG1_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HLD_ALL.SO_LINE_ID
 and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXCFIR_SOL_INV_HLD_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME
